Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp.IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder

Packages that use IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
OpenID Connect Relying Party (RP) login support for Juneau REST servers.

  • Uses of IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp that return IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder.algorithms(com.nimbusds.jose.JWSAlgorithm... values)
    Sets the signing-algorithm allowlist.
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder.clientId(String value)
    Sets the OAuth client id (expected aud).
    static IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.create()
    Static creator.
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder.issuer(String value)
    Sets the expected iss (issuer).
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder.jwkSet(com.nimbusds.jose.jwk.JWKSet value)
    Sets a fixed JWK set (useful for tests / static keys).
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder.jwkSource(com.nimbusds.jose.jwk.source.JWKSource<com.nimbusds.jose.proc.SecurityContext> value)
    Sets a custom JWKSource.
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder.jwksUri(URI value)
    Sets the JWKS endpoint URI the validator fetches signing keys from.
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder.maxClockSkewSeconds(int value)
    Sets the clock-skew tolerance (in seconds) for exp / iat validation.
